query:
UPDATE job_runs
            SET state = 'queued',
                worker_id = NULL,
                started_at = NULL,
                finished_at = NULL,
                attempt = $2,
                scheduled_for = $3,
                result_status = $4,
                exit_code = $5,
                stdout = $6,
                stderr = $7,
                result = $8,
                result_media_type = $9,
                error = $10,
                error_media_type = $11
            WHERE id = $1
